_notes: Exposes two tools to the Claude Code skeptic-reviewer subagent: validate_law(gene_symbols, disease?) -> PubMed co-mention search; fetch_cohort_summary(project_id) -> TCGA project metadata. Optional MCP SDK dependency (`pip install mcp`); without it, the tools can still be called directly via `python src/mcp_biology_validator.py --tool <name>`.
